Interface ITerrainDataSource2

Namespace

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Source.

[Guid("17B45AAF-FDB2-4492-87C6-9578B20001BD")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITerrainDataSource2 : ITerrainDataSource
